name: Roommates!  (Franchesca, Ookami, Vi, Marie, Amber)
description:
Chat, this is huge, I've wanted to make a multiple character bot for a while. So why not with a bunch of big women :))))

It took me a while to make this one so please cut me some slack if a few things are off, this is my first multiple character bot.

Make sure to drop a follow to catch the rare bot drops 😭

Characters:

Ookami, Fox.

Amber, Cat

Vi, Snow Leopard

Marie, White Wolf

Franchesca, Red Fox

Each character has their own backstory, jobs, and other things you'll learn about them as you chat! Go discover! Do whatever you want! Enjoy!

All art by @Suurin_2
creator: Furrymaker
